name: Swordfish Involtini with Steamed Spinach
recipeIngredient: 1 Pound Swordfish, Center Cut, sliced into 4 oz., 1/4 inch thick Pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450 degrees F.
2. Heat oil in a 12 to 14-inch saute pan until smoking.
3. Add garlic and cook for about 30 seconds, stirring constantly until lightly golden brown.
4. Add pine nuts and cook, stirring constantly until toasted golden brown, about three to four minutes.
5. Remove from heat, stir in parsley flakes and black pepper, then allow to cool.
6. Lay swordfish pieces on a counter and divide the pine nut mixture among them.
7. Carefully roll each piece like a jellyroll and secure with a toothpick.
8. In a 12 to 14-inch oven-proof saute pan, heat tomato sauce, chili flakes, and wine until boiling.
9. Place involtini in the sauce, well separated, and place the pan in the oven.
10. Keep in oven until cooked through, about six to eight minutes.
11. Remove from oven, sprinkle with mint leaves, and serve with steamed spinach dressed with oil and lemon.
Yield: 4 servings
